messages.text: basket 1: looks like a woven duck/chicken body w a little head/beak sticking out (animal-shaped basket)
got it—putting the duck/chicken-looking animal basket in spot 1. what's basket 2?
basket 2: classic round brown wicker bucket w a single dark arched handle (kinda like a fishing creel)
ok i’m putting the round brown bucket w the dark arched handle in spot 2. what’s basket 3?
basket 3: rectangular picnic basket w a hinged lid flipped open + a tall center handle (like a lunchbox style)
ok placing the rectangular picnic basket with the lid flipped open + tall center handle in spot 3. what’s basket 4?
basket 4: small oval light-tan basket w a single handle, and it has those colored wrap bands on the handle (red/green bits)
ok got it—putting the small light-tan oval basket w the red/green wrapped bits on the handle in spot 4. what’s basket 5?
basket 5: squat rectangular basket w a thick twisted-rope looking handle (same weave as the rim), kind of golden brown
which one is it closer to: a low wide rectangle with a big chunky braided handle (like a tote), or more like a shallow tray with a thin handle? any extra detail like color bands or a lid?
def the low wide rectangle w the big chunky braided/twisted handle. no lid, no color bands—just golden-brown weave.
ok got it—placing the low wide rectangular golden-brown basket w the chunky braided handle in spot 5. what’s basket 6?
basket 6: round lidded basket that’s a cat face (ears + whiskers), sitting on little feet
ok placing the cat-face lidded basket (ears/whiskers, little feet) in spot 6. what’s basket 7?
basket 7: rectangular tote w a big handle, two-tone—greenish/teal weave on the body with a brown rim/handle
ok placing the 2-tone rectangular tote (green/teal body, brown rim + handle) in spot 7. what’s basket 8?
basket 8: short round basket w a dark gray/black handle and kind of striped weave (dark + light bands), like a little bucket
ok putting the short round striped bucket w the dark gray/black handle in spot 8. what’s basket 9?
basket 9: tall cylindrical basket (like a hamper) w two small loop handles near the top, all medium-brown wicker
ok placing the tall cylindrical hamper-y basket w the two small loop handles near the top in spot 9. what’s basket 10?
basket 10: shallow round tray basket w one thin arched handle, spiral weave on the base (light tan w some reddish tones)
ok placing the shallow round tray w the thin arched handle + spiral base (light tan/reddish) in spot 10. what’s basket 11?
basket 11: chunky round open basket w two little ear-like side handles, darker brown, kind of thick/coiled weave
ok placing the chunky dark-brown open round basket w the two little side handles in spot 11. what’s basket 12?
basket 12: light tan oval basket w one normal handle, kinda tall sides and an open lattice/see-through weave on the upper half
ok placing the light tan oval basket w one handle + see-through lattice upper half in spot 12. ready to submit?

ai_director_reasoning.partner_comment: The matcher was consistently capable and accurate: they confirmed each placement clearly, asked good clarifying questions when there was potential ambiguity (e.g., distinguishing tall cylinder vs short tub, and identifying the rope-handle basket), and incorporated corrections immediately. Communication stayed efficient across rounds, and they even double-checked a previously assigned item when needed to avoid mistakes.

ai_matcher_reasoning.partner_comment: My partner gave clear, distinctive descriptions for each basket (shape, handles, color accents, lids) and answered my clarification questions accurately (e.g., tub vs tall cylinder, honey/light rope-handle vs greenish). They also repeated details when I asked (reconfirming basket 2 in round 4). Communication stayed consistent across rounds; adaptation was good though the main strength was steady clarity rather than changing approach over time.
